violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergen statement on menu board. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
All food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils must be washed, rinsed, and air dried. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the sandwich cold well have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
